requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — Vanuatu Fire Authority and NFPA 855 Requirements; Cyclone-Resilience Design
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——瓦努阿图消防局及NFPA 855要求；抗气旋设计
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——萬那杜消防局及NFPA 855要求；抗氣旋設計

summary.en: The Vanuatu Fire Service (VFS), under the Ministry of Internal Affairs, is the authority having jurisdiction for fire safety in Vanuatu. Commercial and industrial facilities require fire safety design approval and compliance with applicable fire codes before commissioning. Vanuatu does not have a published standalone BESS fire-installation code; fire safety requirements for BESS are assessed on a project basis by VFS in consultation with the project developer and utility. No formal Vanuatu adoption of NFPA 855 (Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems) specifically for BESS has been confirmed from publicly accessible official sources as of the dataset date — this is flagged honestly as a regulatory gap. In practice, international development-financed BESS projects and utility-procured systems in Vanuatu reference NFPA 855 as the best-available standard for stationary BESS fire-installation design, given Vanuatu's historical French/IEC technical heritage and common alignment with Pacific-region development practice. Additionally, Vanuatu is one of the world's most cyclone-exposed nations (Category 5 cyclone risk — Cyclone Pam 2015 caused widespread infrastructure destruction); BESS fire-safety installation design must incorporate structural hardening for extreme wind events and post-cyclone emergency operation considerations. All fire-safety equipment must be sourced from manufacturers whose products are certified by internationally recognised testing laboratories.
summary.zh: 瓦努阿图消防局（VFS）隶属于内政部，是瓦努阿图消防安全的主管机关。商业及工业设施在投入使用前须取得消防安全设计审批，并符合适用消防规范。瓦努阿图未发布专门针对BESS的独立消防安装规范；BESS的消防安全要求由VFS会同项目开发商和公用事业机构以项目为基础进行评估。截至本数据集日期，尚未从可公开获取的官方来源确认瓦努阿图正式采纳NFPA 855（固定式储能系统安装标准）专门用于BESS——诚实标注这一监管空白。实践中，鉴于瓦努阿图历史上的法式/IEC技术传承及与太平洋地区开发实践的普遍协调，国际开发融资BESS项目和公用事业采购系统通常将NFPA 855作为固定式BESS消防安装设计的最佳可用标准。此外，瓦努阿图是全球热带气旋暴露程度最高的国家之一（五级气旋风险——2015年帕姆气旋造成大规模基础设施破坏）；BESS消防安全安装设计须纳入极端风力事件的结构加固及气旋后应急运行考量。所有消防安全设备须来自产品经国际认可测试实验室认证的制造商。
summary.zht: 萬那杜消防局（VFS）隸屬於內政部，是萬那杜消防安全的主管機關。商業及工業設施在投入使用前須取得消防安全設計審批，並符合適用消防規範。萬那杜未發布專門針對BESS的獨立消防安裝規範；BESS的消防安全要求由VFS會同項目開發商和公用事業機構以項目為基礎進行評估。截至本數據集日期，尚未從可公開獲取的官方來源確認萬那杜正式採納NFPA 855（固定式儲能系統安裝標準）專門用於BESS——誠實標註這一監管空白。實踐中，鑑於萬那杜歷史上的法式/IEC技術傳承及與太平洋地區開發實踐的普遍協調，國際開發融資BESS項目和公用事業採購系統通常將NFPA 855作為固定式BESS消防安裝設計的最佳可用標準。此外，萬那杜是全球熱帶氣旋暴露程度最高的國家之一（五級氣旋風險——2015年帕姆氣旋造成大規模基礎設施破壞）；BESS消防安全安裝設計須納入極端風力事件的結構加固及氣旋後應急運行考量。所有消防安全設備須來自產品經國際認可測試實驗室認證的製造商。

standards_or_laws: NFPA 855 — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems (best-available standard for BESS fire installation design in Vanuatu project specifications; formal VFS adoption unconfirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with VFS)
NFPA 13 — Standard for the Installation of Sprinkler Systems (internationally referenced for fire suppression design)
NFPA 72 — National Fire Alarm and Signaling Code (internationally referenced for fire detection design)
IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation
Vanuatu Fire Service (VFS) — project-level fire safety design approval authority; no confirmed standalone BESS fire code as of dataset date

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety under a combination of mandatory standards and project-level fire-safety review. GB 44240-2024 includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells and modules. GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) cover system-level safety including fire-related requirements. Project-level fire-safety review in China is governed by local fire authority approval procedures. These Chinese fire-safety standards and domestic approval procedures are not recognised by Vanuatu VFS as equivalent to internationally expected NFPA-based fire-safety installation requirements. BESS fire-safety evidence prepared under Chinese standards must be supplemented with NFPA 855-aligned design documentation for Vanuatu project review. Chinese BESS enclosure designs are typically not engineered to cyclone wind-load requirements applicable in Vanuatu.
summary.zh: 中国通过强制性标准和项目级消防审查相结合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS电芯和模组的消防安全规定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）覆盖包括消防相关要求在内的系统级安全。中国的项目级消防审查由地方消防主管机关审批程序管控。上述中国消防安全标准和国内审批程序不被瓦努阿图VFS认可为等同于国际预期的基于NFPA的消防安全安装要求。依据中国标准准备的BESS消防安全证据，须在瓦努阿图项目审查中补充符合NFPA 855要求的设计文件。中国BESS机柜设计通常不针对瓦努阿图适用的热带气旋风荷载要求进行工程设计。
summary.zht: 中國通過強制性標準和項目級消防審查相結合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS電芯和模組的消防安全規定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）覆蓋包括消防相關要求在內的系統級安全。中國的項目級消防審查由地方消防主管機關審批程序管控。上述中國消防安全標準和國內審批程序不被萬那杜VFS認可為等同於國際預期的基於NFPA的消防安全安裝要求。依據中國標準準備的BESS消防安全證據，須在萬那杜項目審查中補充符合NFPA 855要求的設計文件。中國BESS機櫃設計通常不針對萬那杜適用的熱帶氣旋風荷載要求進行工程設計。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells/modules; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)

gap.en: Gap: Vanuatu VFS fire-safety project approval is a mandatory installation gate for commercial and industrial BESS installations. No confirmed standalone Vanuatu BESS fire code exists — engage VFS directly at the earliest project stage to establish the applicable fire-safety requirements. Chinese BESS fire-safety documentation based on GB standards does not satisfy internationally expected NFPA-based requirements referenced in Vanuatu project specifications. Key actions: (a) confirm with VFS whether NFPA 855 is the applicable reference for BESS fire-installation design and determine any additional local requirements; (b) prepare BESS fire-safety design documentation aligned with NFPA 855 — including thermal-runaway propagation mitigation, gas detection or ventilation design, suppression system design, emergency shutdown procedures, and separation distances appropriate for Vanuatu's tropical climate (high heat, humidity, corrosive salt-mist); (c) Vanuatu's Category 5 cyclone exposure is a critical gap — BESS enclosure structural integrity under AS/NZS 1170.2 or equivalent Pacific wind-load standards must be designed and certified, as Chinese domestic designs do not address this; (d) ensure fire-suppression system equipment is certified by internationally recognised laboratories (UL, FM Global, Bureau Veritas, DNV, or SGS); (e) engage a fire protection engineer experienced with Pacific SIDS deployment conditions before project commissioning.
gap.zh: 差距：瓦努阿图VFS消防安全项目审批是商业及工业BESS装置的强制安装门槛。瓦努阿图尚无经确认的独立BESS消防规范——应在项目最早阶段直接与VFS接触，确定适用的消防安全要求。依据GB标准编制的中国BESS消防安全文件不满足瓦努阿图项目规格中引用的国际预期基于NFPA的要求。关键行动：（a）与VFS确认NFPA 855是否为BESS消防安装设计的适用参考，并确定任何额外本地要求；（b）准备符合NFPA 855要求的BESS消防安全设计文件——包括针对瓦努阿图热带气候（高温、高湿、腐蚀性盐雾）的热失控蔓延缓解、气体探测或通风设计、抑制系统设计、紧急停机程序及合适的隔离距离；（c）瓦努阿图五级气旋暴露是关键差距——须按AS/NZS 1170.2或同等太平洋风荷载标准对BESS机柜结构完整性进行设计和认证，中国国内设计未涵盖此要求；（d）确保消防抑制系统设备经国际认可实验室（UL、FM Global、Bureau Veritas、DNV或SGS）认证；（e）在项目调试前聘请具有太平洋小岛屿发展中国家部署经验的消防工程师。
gap.zht: 差距：萬那杜VFS消防安全項目審批是商業及工業BESS裝置的強制安裝門檻。萬那杜尚無經確認的獨立BESS消防規範——應在項目最早階段直接與VFS接觸，確定適用的消防安全要求。依據GB標準編制的中國BESS消防安全文件不滿足萬那杜項目規格中引用的國際預期基於NFPA的要求。關鍵行動：（a）與VFS確認NFPA 855是否為BESS消防安裝設計的適用參考，並確定任何額外本地要求；（b）準備符合NFPA 855要求的BESS消防安全設計文件——包括針對萬那杜熱帶氣候（高溫、高濕、腐蝕性鹽霧）的熱失控蔓延緩解、氣體探測或通風設計、抑制系統設計、緊急停機程序及合適的隔離距離；（c）萬那杜五級氣旋暴露是關鍵差距——須按AS/NZS 1170.2或同等太平洋風荷載標準對BESS機櫃結構完整性進行設計和認證，中國國內設計未涵蓋此要求；（d）確保消防抑制系統設備經國際認可實驗室（UL、FM Global、Bureau Veritas、DNV或SGS）認證；（e）在項目調試前聘請具有太平洋小島嶼發展中國家部署經驗的消防工程師。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — VFS fire-safety project approval required for commercial and industrial BESS installations in Vanuatu; no confirmed standalone Vanuatu BESS fire code as of dataset date — verify directly with VFS; cyclone structural hardening is an implicit project-level mandatory requirement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements

source.publisher: Vanuatu Ministry of Internal Affairs (parent authority of Vanuatu Fire Service)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] VFS fire-safety project approval is a mandatory installation gate for commercial and industrial BESS in Vanuatu. No confirmed standalone Vanuatu BESS fire code exists as of the dataset date — this is a regulatory gap, not a permissive environment. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy internationally expected NFPA 855-based requirements. Vanuatu's Category 5 cyclone exposure creates a critical structural hardening gap — BESS enclosures must be engineered to Pacific wind-load standards not addressed by Chinese domestic certification. Engage VFS and a fire protection engineer experienced with Pacific SIDS conditions at the earliest project stage to confirm the applicable fire code and cyclone-hardening requirements before committing to system design or equipment specification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] VFS消防安全项目审批是瓦努阿图商业及工业BESS装置的强制安装门槛。截至本数据集日期，尚无经确认的独立瓦努阿图BESS消防规范——这是监管空白，而非宽松环境。中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足国际预期的基于NFPA 855的要求。瓦努阿图五级气旋暴露造成关键的结构加固差距——BESS机柜须按中国国内认证未涵盖的太平洋风荷载标准进行工程设计。在确定系统设计或设备规格前，应在项目最早阶段与VFS及具有太平洋小岛屿发展中国家条件经验的消防工程师接触，确认适用消防规范和抗气旋加固要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] VFS消防安全項目審批是萬那杜商業及工業BESS裝置的強制安裝門檻。截至本數據集日期，尚無經確認的獨立萬那杜BESS消防規範——這是監管空白，而非寬鬆環境。中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足國際預期的基於NFPA 855的要求。萬那杜五級氣旋暴露造成關鍵的結構加固差距——BESS機櫃須按中國國內認證未涵蓋的太平洋風荷載標準進行工程設計。在確定系統設計或設備規格前，應在項目最早階段與VFS及具有太平洋小島嶼發展中國家條件經驗的消防工程師接觸，確認適用消防規範和抗氣旋加固要求。
